summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AbdoulGame Ultimate Polyglot word search game. All core functionality working perfectly including game mechanics, UI interactions, backend APIs, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Game generation API for all languages (ES/EN/FR) and levels
Game start functionality ('ENTRAR AL ESTADIO' button)
Game board generation with correct grid layout
Timer countdown (starts at 02:00, counts down properly)
Score display and updates (200 points per word found)
Word bank display and marking found words
Settings modal with all controls (volume, language, theme, vibration)
Knowledge/wisdom phrases display when words found
